mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERS (EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , FILE_GROUP_ID) VALUES (#{email} , #{name} , #{password} , #{salt} , SYSDATE , SYSDATE , 0 , 0)
mapper.select: SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD FROM MEMBERS WHERE EMAIL = #{_parameter}
